meta.title: Operation Absolute Resolve: How the U.S. Took Maduro
meta.description:
Early Saturday morning, explosions ripped through Venezuela’s capital of Caracas as a group of American special operations helicopters descended into the city. These rotorcraft carried members of the Army’s secretive Delta Force — arguably the most elite special operations unit in the world — accompanied by law enforcement agents tasked with bringing Venezuela’s illegitimate leader, Nicolas Maduro, into custody. 

Let's talk about how this daring raid played out.
